title: Review architecture invariants before implementation
goal: Detect and prevent architectural, concurrency, and safety drift before code generation or integration.

steps.text: Evaluate architecture and spec context using declared authority order and identify conflicts.
Review for actor isolation violations, IO leakage, mutation-boundary drift, and cancellation safety gaps.
Classify findings by severity and flaw type, then pause for human review before any large implementation action.
Propose only bounded, invariant-preserving corrections and summarize residual risks.

acceptanceCriteria: Architecture and concurrency hazards are explicitly identified
Findings are categorized as architectural, concurrency, safety, or style
Human review stop point is observed before broad implementation
Recommendations preserve product intent and do not expand scope

verification.text: Review findings for correct classification and concrete evidence
Confirm proposed changes preserve invariants and remain scoped
